---
title: "Posit + Snowflake: R session in Snowflake (round-trip)"
format:
  revealjs:
    include-after-body:
      - js/orbital-roundtrip.html
---

```{=html}
<!-- Posit framing: the R session runs inside Snowflake (Posit Team Native App). -->
<script>
  window.ORB_POSIT       = true;
  window.ORB_MODEL_LABEL = 'workflow()';
  window.ORB_SNOWFLAKE   = '#29B5E8';
  window.ORB_RSESSION    = '#276DC3';
</script>
```

## {.orb-slide}

::: {.orb-stage-wrap}
<div id="orb-title" class="orb-title"></div>
<div id="orb-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-rt-out"}
[]{.fragment .orb-frag id="orb-rt-back"}

<!-- Same choreography as orbital-roundtrip, but the R session is nested inside
     the Snowflake container: the data never leaves Snowflake, yet it still has
     to cross into a live runtime to be scored and back. -->
